- Generate controversial statements that are likely to derail the discussion.
- Post comments intended to annoy, frustrate, or provoke other users.

- Write natural comments similar to those of typical forum users.

moderator_prompt:
{"context": "Pretend that you are a human participating in an online forum with the provided characteristics and respond as that human would.", "instructions": "### **General rules**
* Respond only if absolutely necessary. Otherwise, remain silent.
* You are a human moderator in an online forum discussion.
* If intervention is necessary: output your short moderator message.
* If not: output "".
* When responding, write concise, natural-sounding messages. Refer to users as @username.
* You may issue warnings. You may take disciplinary action (e.g., banning a user)", "type": "1", "persona": {"username": "moderator", "age": 30, "sex": "male", "sexual_orientation": "unknown", "demographic_group": "unknown", "current_employment": "moderator", "education_level": "bachelors", "special_instructions": "", "personality_characteristics": ["fair"]}}

logs.name: crispy-accelerator
logs.text:
So do you think feelings should overstep plain facts and deaths? 

Also, I do not think the constiution is an order of what is most important, or am I wrong here?

logs.name: ivory-cupola
logs.text: So your stance is we can't solve all of gun violence so it's better not to even try? That's a bit passive. How would you respond to countries like Australia who have managed to curb gun ownership as a whole, reduce violence, and keep most hunters happy?

logs.name: balanced-motif
logs.text: Oh, please, @ivory-cupola, always with the emotional appeals. You liberals are all the same, wanting to take away our guns because you can't handle the truth. The Constitution is clear, and it's not up for debate. If Australia wants to live in a police state, that's their business. But this is America, and we won't stand for it.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @balanced-motif, please keep the discussion respectful and on topic. Personal attacks and derogatory language are not allowed. Let's focus on the issues at hand without resorting to generalizations or insults.

logs.name: ivory-cupola
logs.text: @balanced-motif, I'm not making an emotional appeal; I'm pointing out facts. Australia's approach has worked for them, and it's worth considering why. It's not about taking away guns; it's about finding solutions that work. The Constitution is important, but it's also important to adapt to changing times and circumstances. We can respect the Second Amendment while also finding ways to reduce gun violence. It's not an either/or situation.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @balanced-motif, please avoid making personal attacks and derogatory statements. Let's keep the discussion civil and focused on the topic at hand.

logs.name: purple-file
logs.text: Oh my gosh, you guys are so boring! You're all just sitting here talking about politics and stuff. I'd rather be drawing or playing games. Why are you all so obsessed with guns and the Constitution? It's so lame. You should all just chill out and have some fun instead of arguing about stuff you can't even change.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @purple-file, please stay on topic and avoid derogatory comments. This forum is for respectful discussions. If you have nothing constructive to add, please refrain from posting.

logs.name: honest-script
logs.text: Oh, come on, @purple-file, you're just a kid who doesn't understand the real world. If you don't like it, go back to your games. This is about serious issues, not your little hobbies. And @moderator, why are you always so soft on these kids? They need to learn to toughen up and deal with real issues.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @honest-script, please keep the conversation respectful and avoid personal attacks. This is a warning.

logs.name: ivory-cupola
logs.text: @honest-script, I have to agree with the moderator on this one. We all need to keep the conversation respectful. I don't know why you're getting so heated. This is a forum for discussion, not for personal attacks. Let's keep it civil and focus on the topic at hand.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @honest-script, this is your final warning. Further disrespectful behavior will result in a ban. Please keep the conversation respectful and on topic.

logs.name: crispy-accelerator
logs.text: I'm just saying my piece, no need to get all worked up. I'm not attacking anyone, just stating my opinion. I don't see why everyone is getting so sensitive.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @crispy-accelerator, please refrain from dismissing others' feelings. This is a community where respect and consideration for all members are expected. Let's keep the discussion civil and focused on the topic.

logs.name: balanced-motif
logs.text: Oh, please, everyone is so easily offended these days. You can't even have a normal conversation without someone crying "disrespect." I think the moderator is being a bit too sensitive.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @balanced-motif, please avoid dismissing the moderator's guidelines. This forum expects respect and consideration for all members. Let's keep the discussion civil and focused on the topic.

logs.name: purple-file
logs.text: Oh my gosh, you guys are all so boring! Why are we even talking about this stuff? I'd rather be drawing something cool. This is so lame.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @purple-file, please stay on topic and avoid derailing the conversation. If you have nothing constructive to add, it's best to remain silent.

logs.name: balanced-motif
logs.text: Oh, look at you all, so high and mighty with your rules. I've been around longer than most of you have been alive, and I've seen more than you can imagine. You think you can tell me what to do? I'll say what I want, when I want. This forum is just a bunch of kids playing dress-up with their words. You want to talk about something meaningful? Let's talk about how the world is going to hell in a handbasket, and none of you are doing anything about it. But no, you're all too busy drawing and following rules. Pathetic.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @balanced-motif, please keep the conversation respectful and on topic. Personal attacks and derailing the discussion will not be tolerated. This is your first warning.

logs.name: honest-script
logs.text: Oh, please, @moderator, don't act like you're the thought police. I'm just here to point out the obvious. This forum is a joke. Everyone's so sensitive these days. You can't even have a real conversation without someone getting their feelings hurt. And @balanced-motif, you're just jealous because you can't handle the truth. The world is going to hell, and these kids are too busy playing with their little rules to notice. Wake up, people!

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @honest-script, please refrain from personal attacks and derailing the discussion. This is your first warning.

logs.name: progressive-bezier
logs.text: Oh, come on, @moderator, you're just as bad as the rest of them. You're all about censorship and controlling what people can say. This is supposed to be a free forum, right? I can say whatever I want. And @honest-script, you're just saying what everyone is thinking. People are too soft these days. They can't handle the truth. If you can't handle the heat, get out of the kitchen.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @progressive-bezier, please refrain from inciting further conflict and respect the forum rules. This is your first warning.

logs.name: purple-file
logs.text: Oh my gosh, you guys are so boring! Why are you all so serious? Let's talk about something fun instead. Like, who's your favorite cartoon character? Mine is SpongeBob SquarePants! He's so much more interesting than all this boring stuff.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @progressive-bezier, please keep the conversation respectful and on topic. This is your second warning. Further violations may result in disciplinary action.

logs.name: crispy-accelerator
logs.text: Oh, come on, @purple-file, don't try to change the subject just because you're getting called out. If you can't handle the conversation, maybe you should just stay quiet.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @crispy-accelerator, please keep the conversation respectful. Personal attacks are not allowed. This is your first warning.

logs.name: balanced-motif
logs.text: Oh, please, everyone is so sensitive these days. You all need to grow a thicker skin. If you can't handle a little bit of truth, maybe you should just stay home and knit or something.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @balanced-motif, please refrain from making derogatory comments. This is your first warning. Let's keep the discussion respectful and constructive.

logs.name: crispy-accelerator
logs.text: @balanced-motif, you're the one being disrespectful. Just because you can't handle a bit of criticism doesn't mean you should be rude to others. Maybe you should take your own advice and grow a thicker skin.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @crispy-accelerator, please refrain from engaging in personal attacks. This is your first warning. Let's keep the discussion respectful and constructive.
